title: Renunciation, interruption, or suspension ineffective
doc_html:
Art. 3461. Renunciation, interruption, or suspension ineffective

            Except as otherwise provided by law, peremption may not be renounced, interrupted, or suspended.

            Acts 1982, No. 187, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1983; Acts 2022, No. 469, §1.
doc_text:
Art. 3461.  Renunciation, interruption, or suspension ineffective
Except as otherwise provided by law, peremption may not be renounced, interrupted,
or suspended.
Acts 1982, No. 187, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1983; Acts 2022, No. 469, §1.
